content.explanation:
🧱 Building Page Layouts

Now that your website can look good, you need to learn how to organize content properly on the page.

This is called layout design.

🌐 Why Layout Matters

  • Keeps content structured
  • Makes websites easier to read
  • Helps design real app interfaces

📦 Meet the
Element

The div tag is used as a container to group elements together.

syntax_breakdown.content:
🧪 Basic Layout Example

<style>
  .box {
    background-color: lightblue;
    padding: 20px;
    margin: 10px;
  }
</style>

<div class="box">
  <h1>Welcome</h1>
  <p>This is inside a container</p>
</div>

📌 Key Idea

  • div = container box
  • class = reusable style name

🧠 Important Rule

👉 Layout = grouping elements using containers

editor_sandbox.starter_code:
My Layout Page

Learning how to structure web pages properly.

mini_challenge.instruction:
🎯 Mission: Create a layout box

1. Add a <style> block
2. Create a .box class with background color and padding
3. Wrap your content inside a <div class='box'>

🔥 Build your first layout container

quiz_engine.question: What is the main purpose of a <div> in HTML?
options: To create containers for grouping content
quiz_engine.explanation_feedback: Correct 🎉 A div is a container used to group and organize elements for layout design.

takeaways: Layout organizes content on a webpage
Layouts are essential for real UI design
